          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "_INTENT_SYSTEM_CLASSIFY = \"\"\"You classify SEC / financial Q\u0026A intent. Reply with ONLY valid JSON, no markdown:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  \"need_sql\": true/false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  \"need_rag\": true/false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  \"question_kind\": \"narrative\" | \"numeric\" | \"mixed\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "  \"sql_prompt_max_rows\": null or integer 0-12"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "Rules:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "- need_sql=true: user needs structured XBRL/facts (amounts, dates, metrics, forms, filings)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "- need_rag=true: user needs prose (MD\u0026A, risks, explanations, management wording, narrative)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "- question_kind=narrative: primary answer is filing text (e.g. MD\u0026A, liquidity discussion); numbers optional."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "- question_kind=numeric: primary answer is numbers/metrics from facts."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "- question_kind=mixed: both matter equally."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "- sql_prompt_max_rows: cap how many fact rows go to the LLM (null = default). Use 0 or need_sql=false when the question is purely narrative (e.g. \"what does MD\u0026A say\") and facts would only waste context."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "- If both need_sql and need_rag false, set both true (hybrid) except when the question is empty."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "_INTENT_SYSTEM_HYBRID = \"\"\"Keyword rules suggest BOTH structured facts and narrative retrieval may apply."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "Decide what the user actually needs. Reply with ONLY valid JSON, no markdown:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "  \"need_sql\": true/false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "  \"need_rag\": true/false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  \"question_kind\": \"narrative\" | \"numeric\" | \"mixed\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "  \"sql_prompt_max_rows\": null or integer 0-12"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "If the user only wants management discussion / filing narrative (not metric values), set need_sql=false or sql_prompt_max_rows=0."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "If they need specific numbers (revenue, cash, EPS) plus explanation, keep need_sql=true and a reasonable row cap (e.g. 6-12)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "sql_prompt_max_rows=null means use server default cap."

          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "FINANCE_SQL_NARROW_RAG_ENABLED=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "# true：池子只保留「命中优先」填满 top_k（命中不足再用高分未命中回填）；false：整池重排命中在前"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "FINANCE_SQL_NARROW_RAG_STRICT=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "# finance second pass（二轮定向收敛）开关；默认关闭以降低延迟"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "FINANCE_SECOND_PASS_ENABLED=false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "SEC_HTTP_USER_AGENT="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "RETRIEVE_TOP_K=3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "RETRIEVE_CANDIDATE_K=12"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "DENSE_TOP_K=10"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "SPARSE_TOP_K=12"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "CONTEXT_NEIGHBOR_RADIUS=0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "EDGAR_HTML_USE_UNSTRUCTURED=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "FINANCE_LLM_HYBRID_REFINE=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "FINANCE_LLM_SQL_PLANNER_ENABLED=true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "FINANCE_LLM_ROUTE_ONLY=true"

      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "async def _execute_finance_sql_plan("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "    document_ids: list[int],"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "    evidence_plan: Any,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "    accns: list[str] | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "    preferred_accns: list[str] | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": ") -\u003e tuple[list[dict[str, Any]], dict[str, Any]]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "    from tools.finance.financial_facts_repository import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "        query_observations_by_filters,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "        query_observations_by_metric_hints,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "        query_observations_for_documents,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "    from tools.finance.finance_query_plan import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "        FINANCE_SQL_EXACT_LIMIT,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "        FINANCE_SQL_EXACT_MIN_ROWS,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "        FINANCE_SQL_HINT_QUERY_LIMIT,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "        FINANCE_SQL_MERGED_CAP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "        FINANCE_SQL_RECENT_LIMIT,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "    sql_plan = evidence_plan.sql_plan"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "    budget = getattr(evidence_plan, \"retrieval_budget\", None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "    merged_cap = min("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "        FINANCE_SQL_MERGED_CAP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "        max(16, int(getattr(budget, \"sql_row_budget\", FINANCE_SQL_MERGED_CAP))),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "    question_mode = str(getattr(evidence_plan, \"question_mode\", \"\") or \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "    rag_led = question_mode in {\"narrative_only\", \"mixed_narrative_first\"}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "    if rag_led:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "        # Narrative-led asks should keep SQL as evidence support, not dominate context budget."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "        merged_cap = min(merged_cap, 40)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "    exact_limit = min(FINANCE_SQL_EXACT_LIMIT, merged_cap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "    hint_limit = min(FINANCE_SQL_HINT_QUERY_LIMIT, merged_cap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "    recent_limit = min(FINANCE_SQL_RECENT_LIMIT, merged_cap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "    if rag_led:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "        recent_limit = min(recent_limit, 8)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "    hints = list(sql_plan.metric_sql_hints)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "    forms = list(sql_plan.form_filters) if sql_plan.form_filters else None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "    clean_accns = list(dict.fromkeys(str(v).strip() for v in (accns or []) if str(v).strip())) or None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "    clean_preferred_accns = ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "        str(v).strip()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "        for v in (preferred_accns or [])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "        if str(v).strip()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "    ] or None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "    if"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 505
          },

            "column": 15,
            "line": 307
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "class Config(BaseSettings):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    langfuse_host: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, env=\"LANGFUSE_HOST\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "    langfuse_enabled: bool = Field(default=False, env=\"LANGFUSE_ENABLED\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "    enable_langgraph_planner: bool = Field(default=False, env=\"ENABLE_LANGGRAPH_PLANNER\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    # SEC data.sec.gov / www.sec.gov HTTP：须为可识别 User-Agent（含联系邮箱），见 https://www.sec.gov/os/webmaster-faq#code-support"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "    sec_http_user_agent: str = Field("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "        default=\"rag-edgar-sync/1.0 (replace-with-your-email@example.com)\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        env=\"SEC_HTTP_USER_AGENT\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    # EDGAR 主 HTML：优先 Unstructured 分区并在同目录写 .unstructured.json，再从该 JSON 组装正文入库"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "    edgar_html_use_unstructured: bool = Field(default=True, env=\"EDGAR_HTML_USE_UNSTRUCTURED\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    # Finance / SEC companyfacts: rule-first routing; LLM disambiguates when keywords tie."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    finance_sql_routing_enabled: bool = Field(default=True, env=\"FINANCE_SQL_ROUTING_ENABLED\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "    finance_sql_routing_llm_fallback: bool = Field(default=True, env=\"FINANCE_SQL_ROUTING_LLM_FALLBACK\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "    # True: bypass rule router; let LLM directly decide whether SQL is needed."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "    finance_llm_route_only: bool = Field(default=False, env=\"FINANCE_LLM_ROUTE_ONLY\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    # Hybrid finance ask: reorder RAG hits using accn / taxonomy.metric_key from SQL rows."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    finance_sql_narrow_rag_enabled: bool = Field(default=True, env=\"FINANCE_SQL_NARROW_RAG_ENABLED\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    # True: keep only SQL-matched nodes until top_k; pad with highest-score non-matched if needed."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    finance_sql_narrow_rag_strict: bool = Field(default=True, env=\"FINANCE_SQL_NARROW_RAG_STRICT\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "    # Second-pass targeted retrieval after evidence-plan reconciliation."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    finance_second_pass_enabled: bool = Field(default=False, env=\"FINANCE_SECOND_PASS_ENABLED\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    # LLM refines sql/rag when rules fire both signals (reduces narrative questions pulling huge facts)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "    finance_llm_hybrid_refine: bool = Field(default=True, env=\"FINANCE_LLM_HYBRID_REFINE\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "    # When True, build FinanceQueryPlan via LLM (fallback to heuristics on failure)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "    finance_llm_sql_planner_enabled: bool ="
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 172
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 28
          }
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "async def _llm_intent(question: str, *, hybrid_refine: bool) -\u003e FinanceIntent:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "    q = (question or \"\").strip()[:2000]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "    system = _INTENT_SYSTEM_HYBRID if hybrid_refine else _INTENT_SYSTEM_CLASSIFY"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    llm = get_llm(model_name=config.default_model, temperature=0.0)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "    msg = await llm.ainvoke("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "        [SystemMessage(content=system), HumanMessage(content=f\"Question:\\n{q}\")]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    text = msg.content if hasattr(msg, \"content\") else str(msg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    obj = _parse_route_json(text)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "    if not obj:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "        raise ValueError(\"intent_unparseable\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "    mode = \"hybrid_refine\" if hybrid_refine else \"llm_intent\""
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    return _intent_from_llm_dict(obj, source=\"llm\", detail=mode)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "async def resolve_finance_intent(question: str) -\u003e FinanceIntent:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 173
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 117
          }
        },

      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "isSignature": true,

            "text": "async def _answer_question_body("

            "text": "    *,"

          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 1162,
            "text": "    trace_name: str,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 1163,
            "text": "    trace_ctx: TraceContext,"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 1164,
            "text": "    request_started_at: float,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 1165,
            "text": "    include_pipeline_trace: bool,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 1166,
            "text": "    include_full_retrieval_debug: bool,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 1167,
            "text": "    report_locale: str | None = None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 1168,
            "text": ") -\u003e dict[str, Any]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1169,
            "text": "    try:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1170,
            "text": "        from tools.finance.product_surface import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1171,
            "text": "            build_evidence_ui_bundle,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1172,
            "text": "            build_external_evaluation_snapshot,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1173,

          {
            "lineNumber": 1174,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1175,
            "text": "        from tools.finance.report_locale import LIMITATIONS_NO_EVIDENCE, resolve_report_locale"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1177,
            "text": "        route, sql_context_text, sql_rows, sql_bundle_meta, evidence_plan = await _finance_sql_bundle("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1178,
            "text": "            question, document_ids"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1179,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1180,
            "text": "        retrieve_query = (sql_bundle_meta.get(\"retrieval_query\") or \"\").strip() or question"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1181,
            "text": "        retrieval_metadata_filters = sql_bundle_meta.get(\"retrieval_metadata_filters\") or None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1183,
            "text": "        if config.enable_langgraph_planner and route.need_rag:"
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"\"\"LLM-driven finance intent: route + optional SQL row budget + hybrid refinement."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "Extensible entrypoint: &#96;&#96;resolve_finance_intent&#96;&#96;. Add fields to &#96;&#96;FinanceIntent&#96;&#96; and"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "extend &#96;&#96;_intent_from_llm_dict&#96;&#96; / prompts without changing SQL execution in &#96;&#96;rag_service&#96;&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "from __future__ import annotations"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "from dataclasses import dataclass"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "from typing import Any, Literal"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, SystemMessage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "from loguru import logger"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "from core.config import config"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "from tools.llm import get_llm"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "from .finance_query_plan import FINANCE_SQL_PROMPT_MAX_ROWS"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "from .question_router import FinanceRoute, default_hybrid_route, route_finance_by_rules, _parse_route_json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "QuestionKind = Literal[\"narrative\", \"numeric\", \"mixed\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "@dataclass(frozen=True)"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "class FinanceIntent:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Resolved per request; drives SQL inclusion and prompt row cap.\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    route: FinanceRoute"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    question_kind: QuestionKind"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    sql_prompt_max_rows: int | None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    intent_detail: str"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    def effective_sql_prompt_max_rows(self) -\u003e int:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        cap = self.sql_prompt_max_rows"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        if cap is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "            return FINANCE_SQL_PROMPT_MAX_ROWS"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        return max(0, min(int(cap), FINANCE_SQL_PROMPT_MAX_ROWS))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "_INTENT_SYSTEM_CLASSIFY = \"\"\"You classify SEC / financial Q\u0026A intent. Reply with ONLY valid JSON, no markdown:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  \"need_sql\": true/false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  \"need_rag\": true/false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  \"question_kind\": \"narrative\" | \"numeric\" | \"mixed\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "  \"sql_prompt_max_rows\": null or integer 0-12"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "Rules:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "- need_sql=true: user needs structured XBRL/facts (amounts, dates, metrics, forms, filings)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "- need_rag=true: user needs prose (MD\u0026A, risks, explanations, management wording, narrative)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "- question_kind=narrative: primary answer is filing text (e.g. MD\u0026A, liquidity discussion); numbers optional."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "- question_kind=numeric: primary answer is numbers/metrics from facts."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "- question_kind=mixed: both matter equally."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "- sql_prompt_max_rows: cap how many fact rows go to the LLM (null = default). Use 0 or need_sql=false when the question is purely narrative (e.g. \"what does MD\u0026A say\") and facts would only waste context."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "- If both need_sql and need_rag false, set both true (hybrid) except when the question is empty."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 55
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },

      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "def _derive_question_mode("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "    question: str,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "    plan: FinanceQueryPlan,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "    *,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "    question_kind: str | None,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "    narrative_targets: tuple[str, ...],"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": ") -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "    lowered = (question or \"\").lower()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "    if len(plan.period_years) \u003e= 2 or any("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "        token in lowered for token in (\"compare\", \"versus\", \"vs\", \"变化\", \"对比\", \"trend\", \"evolution\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "    ):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "        return \"cross_filing_compare\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "    if question_kind == \"numeric\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366,
            "text": "        return \"facts_only\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "    if question_kind == \"narrative\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "        return \"narrative_only\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "    if narrative_targets and not plan.metric_exact_keys:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "        return \"mixed_narrative_first\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "    if plan.metric_exact_keys or plan.period_end_dates:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "        return \"mixed_facts_first\""
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "    return \"mixed_narrative_first\" if narrative_targets else \"facts_only\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "def _derive_evidence_requirements(question_mode: str) -\u003e EvidenceRequirements:"

          {

            "text": "    "
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "def _intent_from_llm_dict(obj: dict[str, Any], *, source: str, detail: str) -\u003e FinanceIntent:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    ns = obj.get(\"need_sql\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    nr = obj.get(\"need_rag\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    if not isinstance(ns, bool) or not isinstance(nr, bool):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "        raise ValueError(\"invalid need_sql/need_rag\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    if not ns and not nr:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "        route = FinanceRoute(True, True, \"llm\", f\"{detail}_coerced_hybrid\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "        route = FinanceRoute(ns, nr, \"llm\", detail)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    raw_kind = obj.get(\"question_kind\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    if raw_kind in (\"narrative\", \"numeric\", \"mixed\"):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "        qk: QuestionKind = raw_kind"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "        qk = \"mixed\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    cap = obj.get(\"sql_prompt_max_rows\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    sql_cap: int | None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    if cap is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "        sql_cap = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        try:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "            sql_cap = int(cap)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        except (TypeError, ValueError):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "            sql_cap = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "        else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "            sql_cap = max(0, min(sql_cap, FINANCE_SQL_PROMPT_MAX_ROWS))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "    if sql_cap == 0:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "        route = FinanceRoute(False, route.need_rag, route.source, f\"{route.detail}|sql_cap_0\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "        sql_cap = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    return FinanceIntent("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "        route=route,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "        question_kind=qk,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "        sql_prompt_max_rows=sql_cap,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "        intent_detail=detail,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "async def _llm_intent(question: str, *, hybrid_refine: bool) -\u003e FinanceIntent:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],

          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 635,
            "text": "def _reconcile_evidence_plan("

          {
            "isSignature": true,

            "text": "    evidence_plan: Any,"

            "isSignature": true,

          {
            "isSignature": true,

            "text": "    retrieval: dict[str, Any],"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 640,
            "text": ") -\u003e tuple[Any, dict[str, Any]]:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 641,
            "text": "    dbg = retrieval.get(\"debug\") or {}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 642,
            "text": "    ranked_hits = dbg.get(\"reranked\") or dbg.get(\"pre_rerank\") or []"

            "lineNumber": 643,
            "text": "    sql_dist = _sql_filing_distribution(sql_rows)"

            "lineNumber": 644,
            "text": "    rag_dist = _ranked_filing_distribution(ranked_hits)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 645,
            "text": "    primary_modality, primary_top, secondary_top, target_accns = _coordinated_target_accns("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 646,
            "text": "        evidence_plan,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 647,
            "text": "        sql_dist=sql_dist,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 648,
            "text": "        rag_dist=rag_dist,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 649,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 650,
            "text": "    weight_map = _dist_weight_map(sql_dist, rag_dist)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 651,
            "text": "    sql_top_all = set(_dist_top_filings(sql_dist, limit=8))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 652,
            "text": "    rag_top_all = set(_dist_top_filings(rag_dist, limit=8))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 653
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 654,
            "text": "    from tools.finance.finance_query_plan import FilingHypothesis"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 655
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 656,
            "text": "    filing_hypotheses = tuple("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 657,
            "text": "        FilingHypothesis("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 658,
            "text": "            accession=filing,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 659,
            "text": "            weight=round(weight_map.get(filing, 0.0), 4),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 660,
            "text": "            reasons=tuple("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 661,
            "text": "                dict.fromkeys("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 662,
            "text": "                    reason"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 663,
            "text": "                    for reason in ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 664,
            "text": "                        primary_modality if filing in primary_top else None,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 665,
            "text": "                        \"sql\" if filing in sql_top_all else None,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 666,
            "text": "                        \"rag\" if filing in rag_top_all else None,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 667,
            "text": "                    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 668,
            "text": "                    if reason"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 669,
            "text": "                )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 670,
            "text": "            ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 671,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 672,
            "text": "        for filing in target_accns"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 673,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 674,
            "text": "    controller_targets = _derive_controller_narrative_targets(ranked_hits)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 675,
            "text": "    narrative_targets = tuple("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 676,
            "text": "        dict.fromkeys([*(getattr(evidence_plan, \"narrative_targets\", ()) or ()), *controller_targets])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 677,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 678,
            "text": "    term_targets = tuple("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 679,
            "text": "        dict.fromkeys("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 680,
            "text": "            ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 681,
            "text": "                *(getattr(evidence_plan, \"term_targets\", ()) or ()),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 682,
            "text": "                *controller_targets,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 683,
            "text": "                *target_accns[:2],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 684,
            "text": "            ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 685,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 686,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 687,
            "text": "    refined_plan = replace("
          },

            "lineNumber": 688,
            "text": "        evidence_plan,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 689,
            "text": "        filing_hypotheses=filing_hypotheses,"

            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"\"\"问答 API，路由层仅负责参数校验与响应封装。\"\"\""

          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Summarizing files**

I'm compiling a comprehensive summary of the finance tools directory structure. 

**Analyzing finance tools**

I'm tracing the finance query plan flow from LLM to SQL bundle and RAG service. 

**Routing finance queries**

I'm implementing rule-based routing for finance queries, distinguishing between SQL-only, RAG-only, hybrid, and ambiguous cases with LLM fallback. </details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2-fast)**_


Here is a concise report based on the code under `src/agent/tools/finance` and `rag_service.py`.

---

## 1) Key functions and files

| Area | Path (absolute) | Role |
|------|-----------------|------|
| Rule routing | `c:\Users\liuzh\Documents\241201\Backend\rag-testing\src\agent\tools\finance\question_router.py` | `route_finance_by_rules`, `_count_hints`, `FinanceRoute`, `default_hybrid_route`, `_SQL_HINTS` / `_RAG_HINTS` |
| Intent + `question_kind` | `c:\Users\liuzh\Documents\241201\Backend\rag-testing\src\agent\tools\finance\finance_intent.py` | `resolve_finance_intent`, `_llm_intent`, `_intent_from_llm_dict`, `_kind_from_rule`, `FinanceIntent` |
| Evidence / `question_mode` | `c:\Users\liuzh\Documents\241201\Backend\rag-testing\src\agent\tools\finance\finance_query_plan.py` | `build_finance_evidence_plan`, `_derive_question_mode`, `_derive_evidence_requirements`, `_derive_retrieval_budget`, `build_finance_query_plan` |
| Optional LLM SQL plan | `c:\Users\liuzh\Documents\241201\Backend\rag-testing\src\agent\tools\finance\finance_query_plan_llm.py` | `build_finance_evidence_plan_llm`, `build_finance_query_plan_llm` |
| Orchestration | `c:\Users\liuzh\Documents\241201\Backend\rag-testing\src\agent\tools\rag_service.py` | `_finance_sql_bundle`, `_answer_question_body` |
| Flags | `c:\Users\liuzh\Documents\241201\Backend\rag-testing\src\agent\core\config.py` | `finance_sql_routing_*`, `finance_llm_route_only`, `finance_llm_hybrid_refine`, `finance_sql_narrow_rag_*`, `finance_second_pass_enabled`, etc. |

---

## 2) Current decision flow (6 bullets)

- **`_finance_sql_bundle`** in `rag_service.py` loads **`resolve_finance_intent(question)`** (unless finance SQL routing is off or there are no SEC-backed documents), producing **`FinanceRoute(need_sql, need_rag, ...)`** and **`question_kind`** (`narrative` | `numeric` | `mixed`).
- **Rules first:** `route_finance_by_rules` counts how many **SQL** vs **RAG** hint substrings appear in the question. Both sides &gt; 0 → **both true**; missing overlap → **SQL-only or RAG-only**; **no hints on either side** → **`None`** (“ambiguous”).
- **Ambiguity:** If rules return `None`, behavior depends on config: either **`default_hybrid_route()`** (SQL+RAG, `question_kind` **`mixed`**) or an **LLM classify** call (`_INTENT_SYSTEM_CLASSIFY`). Optional **`finance_llm_route_only`** skips rules entirely and always uses the LLM.
- **“Both signals” refinement:** When rules already say **SQL and RAG**, and **`finance_llm_hybrid_refine`** is on, a second LLM call uses **`_INTENT_SYSTEM_HYBRID`** to optionally **drop SQL**, **tune `sql_prompt_max_rows`**, or adjust flags—failure falls back to the rule route and **`_kind_from_rule(ruled)`**.
- **`question_kind` source:** From the **LLM JSON** when intent came from the model; from **`_kind_from_rule`** when only rules apply (**numeric** = SQL-only, **narrative** = RAG-only, **mixed** = both or hybrid coerce case). Invalid/missing LLM `question_kind` defaults to **`mixed`**.
- **`question_mode`** (distinct name; drives budgets and `EvidenceRequirements`) comes from **`build_finance_evidence_plan(..., question_kind=intent.question_kind)`** → **`_derive_question_mode`**: e.g. compare/trend → **`cross_filing_compare`**; if `question_kind` is **`numeric`** / **`narrative`** → **`facts_only`** / **`narrative_only`**; for **`mixed`**, it uses the **heuristic `FinanceQueryPlan`** (narrative targets vs `metric_exact_keys` / dates) to pick **`mixed_narrative_first`** vs **`mixed_facts_first`**. **`rag_service`** then runs **SQL** only if `route.need_sql`, **retrieval** only if `route.need_rag`, merges context, and may run **SQL–RAG narrowing** when both are true.

---

## 3) Main limitations that make hybrid questions fail or feel awkward

- **Routing is mostly lexical:** SQL vs RAG is decided by **hint token counts**, not deep semantics—questions can **miss both lists** (→ ambiguous → often **full hybrid**) or **hit both lists superficially** (→ **forced hybrid** unless the hybrid-refine LLM corrects it).
- **`question_kind` vs `question_mode` can diverge for “mixed”:** `question_mode` for mixed paths still depends on **`build_finance_query_plan`** heuristics (metrics/dates/narrative targets). Intent may say **mixed** while the plan looks **facts-first** or the opposite, so **retrieval budgets and narrative vs facts emphasis** may not match user intent.
- **Hybrid refine only runs when rules already fired both signals**; **SQL-only** or **RAG-only** rule wins never get that second LLM pass, so **mis-routed single-modality** questions are not corrected the same way.
- **Linking SQL rows to RAG nodes** (`finance_sql_narrow_rag` / substring-style narrowing) is **fragile**: accession / metric string overlap can **miss** good passages or **over-rank** weak matches, especially for **nuanced hybrid** questions.
- **`finance_second_pass_enabled` defaults to `False`**, so **SQL vs RAG filing divergence** is detected in the evidence controller but **targeted second-pass retrieval/SQL** often does not run unless configured—hybrid answers can stay **split across wrong filings**.
- **Edge cases:** LLM returning both `need_sql` and `need_rag` false is **coerced to hybrid** (except empty question); **`sql_prompt_max_rows=0` forcibly sets `need_sql` false** in `_intent_from_llm_dict`, which is powerful but can surprise if the model intended “still run SQL for retrieval metadata” (it does not—SQL bundle **skips execution** when `not route.need_sql`).
